channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iranian rabbi describes Israel’s destruction of a Tehran synagogue
item.description: Iranian rabbi describes how he was informed that one of Tehran’s few synagogues had been destroyed in an Israel strike.

item.title: Gaza families mourn loved ones killed in overnight Israeli air strikes
item.description: Families gather over bodies outside a Gaza hospital after overnight Israeli air strikes killed seven people.

item.title: Vigil held in Madrid for victims of Israeli strikes on Lebanon
item.description: Dozens gathered in Madrid for a vigil honouring the victims of Israeli airstrikes on Lebanon.

item.title: Ceasefire brings some relief for Iranians but economic outlook remains grim
item.description: Activity picks up in Tehran's Grand Bazaar compared with before the ceasefire, but vendors say sales remain slow.

item.title: Strait of Hormuz leverage looms over US-Iran talks in Islamabad
item.description: US and Iran hold first direct talks since 1979 in Islamabad, with progress hinging on the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Machete-wielding man killed by police in New York’s Grand Central station
item.description: Three elderly victims were wounded at the transit hub attack as authorities continue to investigate, police said.

item.title: US-Iran ceasefire: Can pressure, incentives, and risks deliver a final deal
item.description: Can US‑Iran ceasefire hold for talks? Vance team, midterm politics, energy risks, Tehran seeks relief.

item.title: Lebanon mourns security forces killed in Israeli strike
item.description: Lebanon held funeral ceremonies for 13 members of the country’s State Security agency killed in an Israeli strike.

item.title: US-Iran direct talks on ending war under way in Pakistan
item.description: Discussions between Iran and US delegations begin following separate bilateral meetings with Pakistani prime minister.

item.title: Al Jazeera’s Diplomatic Editor outlines key issues in US-Iran talks
item.description: With US and Iranian officials set to meet in Pakistan, Al Jazeera’s James Bays outlines the sticking points ahead.
